---
title: "Week 10"
---

::: {style="color: #F66D7A"}
### Monday (4/20)
:::

**Topics**

-   Change of variable formula (1D and general n-D)

**Daily assignment**

To be completed and submitted to Canvas by 9:00am

-   [Daily assignment](daily/DA_26.pdf) (a bit longer because the example is long; please plan accordingly)

**Class activity**

-   Transformation [practice problems](class/CA_26.pdf)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: {style="color: #F66D7A"}
### Wednesday (4/22)
:::

**Topics**

-   Beta distribution
-   Gamma distribution

**Daily assignment**

-   None!

**Class activity**

-   Beta and Gamma [practice problems](class/CA_28.pdf)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: {style="color: #F66D7A"}
### Friday (4/24)
:::

**Topics**

-   Order statistics

**Daily assignment**

-   None!

**Class activity**

-   TBD
